title: Perihelion v1.4.1
content:
Perihelion has been updated to v1.4.1, splitting its routing to serve a minimalist landing page at the root URL (/) and the main React SPA workspace at (/home), fully integrated with the local dev server and production Apache rules.

What changed:

  • Minimalist Landing Page: Created a new premium editorial landing page at the root URL using the exact off-white layout format, 36px white banners, left-aligned typography, and solar gold/amber transitions.
  • Split Routing Scheme: Moved the React SPA workspace to the /home URL scheme.
  • Query-Based Share Redirect: Implemented automatic redirection for short share links (e.g. ?share=xxxx) to route directly to the SPA at /home?share=xxxx, bypassing the landing page.
  • Robots Noindex Meta-tag: Added a robots noindex meta-tag to the SPA shell index.html to prevent indexing of the active browser interface.
  • Apache Rewrite Configurations: Updated the production .htaccess rewrite rules in the main repository to handle the landing and SPA routing splits natively on Apache static hosting.
